Bindings.Binding: if OmniInventory.PhysicalSort and OmniInventory.PhysicalSort.Sort then OmniInventory.PhysicalSort:Sort({ consolidateStacks = true, routeSpecialized = true }) elseif OmniInventory.Frame and OmniInventory.Frame.PhysicalSortBags then OmniInventory.Frame:PhysicalSortBags() end
if OmniInventoryFrame and OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox then OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox:SetText("") OmniInventoryFrame.searchBox:ClearFocus() end
